title: Monetary Inflation vs Price Inflation
description: Monetary inflation tracks supply expansion of money, while price inflation describes observed changes in goods and services prices. Distinguishing them clarifies policy narratives and Bitcoin thesis claims.

resources.title: Bitcoin.page
resources.notes: Introductory distinction between monetary base expansion and CPI-like indicators.
